reason: This is a common Islamic prayer verse (Quran 33:56) and blessing upon Prophet Muhammad, widely used by general Muslims. Contains no extremist content or ISIS-specific markers.
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: ﴿إن الله وملائكته يصلون على النبي ياأيها الـذيـن ءامنو صَـلوا عَليه وَسلِّموا تسليما﴾ اللهم صلّ وسلم على نبينا محمدﷺ
